title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, and pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; chat, generate, and list local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings, and tool calling in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui (open-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, RAG, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, and delete models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Ready-to-run Retrieval-Augmented Generation example using Ollama, Chroma, and LangChain.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean React chat interface that talks to a local Ollama instance via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU support and model pre-loading.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official CUDA-enabled Docker images for Ollama to run models on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance and streams replies back to users.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot bringing local LLM chat to Discord servers via Ollama.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for chatting and generating with Ollama models via async HTTP client.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with chat, generate, and embedding endpoints; supports .NET 6+.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Official registry of ready-to-run Modelfile configurations (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, etc.).

title: ollama-rag-langchain-tutorial
summary: Step-by-step notebook showing how to build a RAG system with Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models with streaming support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.
